creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 213556
patch to update nvidia-settings and -xconfig from 440.64 to 440.82

Hi Alexander,

please update nvidia-settings and nvidia-xconfig to 440.82. 

Note I am counting maintainer timeout since PR 245454, and we've had maintainer timeouts on prior updates, too, so if you want to extend your time to 14 days from _THIS_ PR, please follow up with at least a comment "am on it".

Should I commit on maintainer timeout grounds, I'll reset the these two ports to ports@ (or danfe@ if he wants to take these).
